title: Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises:
Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
